items.title: Enhance OAuth Scope UI with Grouping and Auto-Select in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update fixes the checkbox binding for OAuth scopes by changing `:value` to `:label`, resolving a 400 error related to invalid scopes. Scopes are now organized into four tiers for better clarity, and selecting a `:write` scope will automatically check the corresponding `:read` scope. These improvements are applied to both the creation and editing dialogs for OAuth applications.

items.title: Refactor OAuth Fields to ArrayField in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update replaces space-separated string fields with PostgreSQL's native `ArrayField` for `redirect_uris` and `scopes` in the OAuth models. The migration has been rewritten, and model helpers have been simplified, enhancing code clarity and performance. Additionally, serializers now utilize `ListField` directly, improving the handling of these fields in API responses.

items.title: Fix FontAwesomeIcon Registration in Announcement Views in Frontend Web 🎨
items.summary: This update resolves an issue where the FontAwesome icons were not rendering in the announcement views due to missing imports and registrations. The `FontAwesomeIcon` component has been successfully added to both `AnnouncementPopover.vue` and `Announcement.vue`. This change ensures that the bullhorn and wand-magic-sparkles icons are displayed correctly in the application.

items.title: Enhance Coin Page Loading Experience in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the loading experience on the coin page by displaying skeleton loaders instead of incorrect placeholders. The stat cards now show a loading state until both coin info and policy data are fully loaded, eliminating any flash of incorrect data. Additionally, the discount tiers section waits for both API calls to complete before rendering, ensuring a smoother user experience.

items.title: Enhance Selector Borders and Default to Dark Mode in Nexior 🌙
items.summary: This update standardizes the borders of custom selector components to improve visibility in both light and dark modes. Additionally, chat model avatar icons now feature a solid border for better clarity. New users will default to dark mode unless a theme preference is set, ensuring a consistent user experience.

items.title: Fixed DeepSeek Avatar Icon in Nexior 🎨
items.summary: The DeepSeek avatar icon has been updated from a dark, invisible image to the original clean blue logo on a white background. This change resolves the broken display issue in the model selector dropdown and chat messages on the DeepSeek page. Other model pages remain unaffected by this update.

items.title: Strengthen OAuth2 Security with Key Fixes in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update addresses critical OAuth2 security issues, including the preservation of refresh token scopes and improved field filtering based on user permissions. Key changes include the removal of a dead branch in the offline_access logic, fixes to scope handling, and the addition of 22 unit tests to ensure robust functionality. Overall, these enhancements significantly improve the security and usability of the authentication process.

items.title: Enhance Task Previews with Text Overflow Handling in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces improved text overflow handling across all task preview cards in Nexior. Key changes include the addition of CSS properties like `overflow: hidden`, `text-overflow: ellipsis`, and `white-space: nowrap` to ensure that long prompts are truncated appropriately. This enhancement affects 14 different components, ensuring a consistent user experience across the platform.

items.title: Update Default Veo Model to veo31-fast in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: The default Veo model has been updated from `veo2-fast` to `veo31-fast` in Nexior. This change ensures that users will now load with the improved model selected by default, enhancing performance and user experience. The update includes modifications to the relevant configuration files.

items.title: Enhance Announcement Admin Buttons in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: Updated the Edit and Delete actions in the announcement admin table to use proper rounded buttons instead of link-style buttons. The operation column width was increased from 160px to 200px to better accommodate the new button styling. This change improves the user interface and ensures that button functionalities remain intact.

items.title: Enhance AI Polish with New Env Vars in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces the `ACEDATACLOUD_API_BASE_URL` and `ACEDATACLOUD_API_TOKEN` environment variables to the K8s deployment. These variables utilize the existing `acedatacloud-api` secret to enhance the announcement AI polish endpoint. This change aims to improve the functionality and reliability of the AI polish feature.

items.title: Automated i18n Updates from zh-CN in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This PR introduces automatic translation updates for internationalization (i18n) based on changes from the zh-CN source. A series of cache files have been renamed to reflect these updates, ensuring that the application remains up-to-date with the latest translations. This enhancement will improve the user experience for Chinese-speaking users.

items.title: Enhance WanCli Mapping and Fix Lint Issues in Clis 🚀
items.summary: This update adds a new mapping for the WanCli repository in sync.yaml and updates the README.md to include WanCli in the CLI tools table. Additionally, several ruff lint issues in the wan CLI have been resolved, improving code quality and maintainability.

items.title: Exciting New npm Package and Codex Support in Skills 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces the new npm package `acedatacloud-skills`, enabling easy skill distribution via `npx`. Additionally, an AGENTS.md file has been added to enhance OpenAI Codex compatibility and skill discovery. The README has been updated with installation instructions, and a CI workflow for npm publishing has been implemented to streamline releases.

items.title: Enhance README with MCPs and Publishing Status in M C Ps 🚀
items.summary: This update enriches the README by adding four new MCPs: kling, hailuo, wan, and producer. It also introduces PyPI package names, a category column, and a section detailing the publishing channels' status. Additionally, the documentation now includes a full sync pipeline flow and a quick start guide for development.

items.title: Enhance Announcement Features in Frontend Web 🎉
items.summary: This update fixes several issues with the announcement popover and admin page. Key changes include correcting the pagination response key for announcements, improving header icon alignment, and adding AI polish functionality for titles and content. Additionally, Chinese placeholders have been introduced for input fields, enhancing the user experience for Chinese-speaking users.

items.title: Enhance Announcement Features in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces auto-generation of `translation_key` from UUID during announcement creation when not provided. Additionally, a new AI-powered content polishing endpoint has been added for super users, enhancing the overall announcement management experience. URL ordering has also been fixed to ensure proper routing.

items.title: Enhance Input Border Visibility in Nexior ✨
items.summary: This update restores the visibility of borders for input, select, and textarea elements in both light and dark modes. The fix combines the existing box-shadow with a 1px inset border, ensuring a consistent appearance across themes. Redundant dark-mode-only border overrides have been removed for a cleaner implementation.

items.title: Hatchling Version Pinning and Lint Fixes in Clis 🚀
items.summary: This update pins the `hatchling` package to versions less than 1.22.0 across five CLI projects to prevent compatibility issues with Twine 6.2.0. Additionally, it aligns the linting and formatting standards across all CLIs, ensuring consistency and improved code quality. Key files modified include `pyproject.toml` for each CLI and various client files.

items.title: Launch of the New WAN CLI Tool in Clis 🚀
items.summary: We've introduced the `wan` CLI tool, fully aligned with the Tongyi Wansiang OpenAPI specifications. This tool enables users to generate videos from text prompts and images, manage tasks, and retrieve model information, all from the command line. With comprehensive support for various models and parameters, this addition enhances our CLI offerings significantly.

items.title: Sync Confirmation for WAN - No Changes Needed in M C Ps 🚀
items.summary: The sync pipeline indicated a need for review of the `wan` API due to recent updates in the Docs repo. After investigation, it was confirmed that the only changes were related to a temporary test metadata field, with no actual API modifications. All models and parameters in `wan/` are already aligned with the Docs specification, ensuring consistency.

items.title: Luma Docs Sync Verification Completed in A P Is 🚀
items.summary: The verification of the Luma documentation against the Docs repository has been successfully completed. No changes were necessary as all guide markdown files remain unmodified and the content is already in sync. This PR serves to document the findings of the sync verification process.

items.title: Enhance Wan Service Documentation in A P Is 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces comprehensive documentation for the Wan video generation service, including a new README and integration guides for both the video generation and tasks APIs. Key additions include quick-start examples, detailed API integration instructions, and a mapping update in the sync configuration. These enhancements will facilitate easier implementation and usage for developers working with the Wan service.

items.title: Enhance video generation tools with size parameter in M C Ps 🎥
items.summary: This update synchronizes the `wan` MCP server with the latest OpenAPI specification, adding a crucial `size` parameter to the video generation tools. The `size` parameter allows users to specify the dimensions of the generated video, enhancing flexibility and control over video output. All other models and parameters are already aligned with the spec.

items.title: Sync wan-video SKILL.md with OpenAPI updates in Skills 🚀
items.summary: This update synchronizes the `wan-video/SKILL.md` file with the latest OpenAPI specification from `AceDataCloud/Docs`. Key changes include the addition of the `size` parameter and the removal of the `timeout` parameter, ensuring the documentation accurately reflects the current API capabilities. The `luma-video/SKILL.md` remains unchanged as it is already in sync.

items.title: Fix twine version and MCP Registry dependency in M C Ps 🚀
items.summary: This update pins the twine version to `>=5.0,<6.1` across all 15 MCP publish workflows to resolve the `InvalidDistribution` error caused by twine 6.2.0. Additionally, the `publish-mcp-registry` job dependency has been updated to ensure it waits for the PyPI upload to complete before validation. These changes will prevent workflow failures and improve the publishing process.

items.title: Enhance Logo Display and Dark Mode Borders in Nexior 🎨
items.summary: This update introduces a fix for the logo display, ensuring the favicon is shown when the sidebar is collapsed and the full logo when expanded. Additionally, subtle dark mode borders have been added to various form elements for a more polished appearance. These changes enhance the user interface and improve visual consistency across the application.

items.title: Cleanup: Enhance .gitignore and remove unnecessary files in Clis 🚀
items.summary: This update removes the accidentally committed `.coverage` binary file and enhances the `.gitignore` by adding entries for `.coverage`, `htmlcov/`, and `coverage.xml`. These changes improve project cleanliness and prevent unwanted files from being tracked in the repository.

items.title: Standardized MCP Server Structures in M C Ps 🚀
items.summary: This update aligns the file structure across all 15 MCP servers, using SunoMCP as the reference. Key changes include the addition of 67 new files, ensuring identical CI/CD, tooling, and development files across all servers. This standardization enhances maintainability and consistency in the development process.

items.title: Enhance Solana X402 Payment Flow in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update upgrades the Solana X402 payment process to utilize `signAndSendTransaction`, addressing wallet warning issues and ensuring the user wallet acts as the fee payer. Additionally, the Node.js `Buffer` dependency has been removed for better browser compatibility, and a fallback to `signTransaction` is implemented for wallets that do not support the new method. These changes improve the overall user experience and align with best practices.

items.title: Exciting New CLI Tools Added in Clis 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces four powerful CLI tools: Midjourney, Flux, SERP, and a unified AceDataCloud CLI. Each tool features a comprehensive command structure, rich output formatting, and a complete test suite. Additionally, the monorepo README has been updated to reflect these new additions, enhancing the overall functionality and user experience.

items.title: Exciting New Publish and Deploy Workflows for Hailuo, Wan, and Producer in M C Ps 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces new `publish.yml` and `deploy.yaml` workflows for the hailuo, wan, and producer MCP servers. The publish workflow enables publishing to multiple platforms including PyPI and the VS Code Marketplace, while the deploy workflow facilitates Docker builds and Kubernetes deployments. These enhancements streamline the development process and ensure seamless integration with existing systems.

items.title: Exciting New Wan-Video Skill Added in Skills 🎥
items.summary: We've introduced the new `wan-video` skill, enabling AI video generation using Wan (Alibaba) technology. This skill supports various features including text-to-video, image-to-video, and multi-resolution options, enhancing our AI-media plugin bundle. Additionally, the marketplace configuration has been updated to include this new skill.

items.title: Enhance Localization by Replacing Hardcoded Strings in Nexior 🌍
items.summary: This update replaces hardcoded strings in the X402Pay component with internationalization (i18n) keys, improving localization support. The changes include updating wallet titles and status labels to use existing keys for both English and Chinese locales. Note that WalletConnect integration has been deferred for future implementation.

items.title: Enhance Dynamic Resource Discovery in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update replaces the hardcoded demo endpoint with a dynamic API resource list sourced from the database. It queries production APIs to build gateway URLs, which are cached for 5 minutes to optimize performance. Additionally, a new `X402_GATEWAY_URL` setting has been introduced to streamline configuration.

items.title: Enhance X402 Payment Requirements with Timeout Feature in Gateway 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces the `maxTimeoutSeconds` field to the Base and Solana payment requirements in 402 responses, with a default value of 600 seconds. This change is crucial for certain x402 clients to manage timeouts effectively. The timeout duration can be configured via the `X402_MAX_TIMEOUT_SECONDS` environment variable.

items.title: Enhance Transaction Handling in x402 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces improved handling for pending transactions during settlement processes. Key changes include the addition of a `check_transaction_status()` method in the ChainHandler interface, which supports both Base and Solana chains. New tests have been implemented to ensure the persistence of transaction hashes and the reconciliation process, enhancing reliability and user experience.

items.title: Enhance Song List Layout with Text Overflow in Nexior 🎶
items.summary: This update introduces text overflow ellipsis functionality to the Suno task preview component. Key changes include adding CSS properties to ensure long song titles and styles are properly truncated, preventing layout breakage. The adjustments enhance the user experience by maintaining a clean and organized display.

items.title: Exciting New MCP Servers and Enhancements in M C Ps 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces four new MCP servers: KlingMCP, HailuoMCP, WanMCP, and ProducerMCP, each equipped with a variety of tools for video and music generation. Additionally, cross-cutting improvements have been made across all 15 MCPs, including standardized documentation and version updates. These enhancements aim to streamline user experience and maintain consistency across the platform.

items.title: Introducing PayPal Payment Option in Nexior 🎉
items.summary: This update adds a new PayPal payment option to the order detail page, controlled by the `ENABLE_PAYPAL` feature flag. The `PaypalPay.vue` component has been implemented with auto-refresh polling, ensuring a seamless payment experience. Additionally, internationalization entries for PayPal labels have been included for English and Chinese (zh-CN).

items.title: Updated Navigator Logo with CDN Support in Nexior 🎨
items.summary: This update introduces a new CDN-hosted brand logo for the navigator sidebar, ensuring consistent branding across the application. The logo's sizing has been adjusted to fit both expanded and collapsed states, enhancing visibility in dark and light modes. Key files modified include Logo.vue and Preview.vue, improving overall user experience.

items.title: Exciting PayPal Payment Integration in Backend 🎉
items.summary: This update introduces PayPal as a new payment option within the order system. Key changes include the addition of PayPal to the payment methods enum, new utility functions for creating and retrieving PayPal payments, and a feature flag to control its activation. The integration aims to enhance payment flexibility while maintaining existing order functionalities.

items.title: Integrate PayPal Payment Provider in Pay Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces PayPal payment endpoints, allowing users to create and query payments through PayPal. The new endpoints include `POST /payment/paypal` for payment creation and `GET /payment/paypal/{id}` for querying payment status. Configuration is managed via environment variables, ensuring flexibility in deployment.

items.title: Revamp Tests for Multichain Views in x402 🚀
items.summary: This update rewrites tests to align with the production `views_multichain` code, replacing legacy imports and ensuring compatibility. Key changes include mocking the payment settlement method and adding tests for the `/supported` endpoint and idempotent settle functionality. All tests have been updated to ensure they accurately reflect the new multichain architecture.

items.title: Fix idempotency issue for settled nonce in x402 🚀
items.summary: This update resolves an idempotency bug in the settle endpoint of `views_multichain.py`. Previously, attempting to re-settle an already-settled nonce resulted in an error; now it correctly returns a success response with the original transaction hash. This change ensures that callers can retry the `/settle` endpoint and receive consistent success responses.

items.title: Revamped UI with a Stunning Purple Theme in Nexior 🎨
items.summary: This update features a complete visual redesign of the Nexior UI, transitioning from teal to a vibrant purple brand identity across 75 files. Key enhancements include the addition of the Inter font, glassmorphism effects, and a redesigned navigator with category grouping and collapse support. The overhaul improves user experience through consistent design tokens and a refreshed layout for all tools and pages.

items.title: Revamped Q2-Q4 Roadmap with Actionable Deliverables in Roadmap 🚀
items.summary: This update replaces vague roadmap items for Q2-Q4 with specific, actionable deliverables sourced from the ACE growth plan. Key areas include Developer Platform enhancements, AI model updates, and ecosystem partnerships, ensuring all items are concrete and measurable. The roadmap now reflects a higher specificity level, aligning with Q1's standards for observable outcomes.

items.title: Automated i18n Updates from zh-CN in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces automatic translation updates for internationalization (i18n) based on changes from the zh-CN source. Key modifications include enhancements across multiple languages, ensuring a more consistent and accurate user experience. The changes affect various language files, improving accessibility for a broader audience.

items.title: Streamline project structure by removing AutoCert in Index 🚀
items.summary: This update removes the AutoCert submodule from the project, simplifying the repository structure. The AutoCert directory is now added to .gitignore, indicating it is a standalone repository. These changes enhance project clarity and maintainability.

items.title: Clean Up Unused Workflow File in Index 🚀
items.summary: The unused `.claude/claude-code-action.yml` file has been removed as it was incorrectly placed and had no effect on workflows. This cleanup helps streamline the repository and eliminates confusion regarding workflow configurations. No workflows were referencing this file, ensuring a smooth transition.

items.title: Enhance Claude with New Infra Management Commands in Index 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces five new slash commands for managing infrastructure within Claude: `/manage-cls`, `/manage-cos`, `/manage-dns`, `/manage-edgeone`, and `/manage-tke`. Each command is designed to streamline operations related to Tencent Cloud services, enhancing the overall functionality of the platform. Additionally, the CLAUDE.md skill table has been updated to reflect these changes, ensuring users have access to the latest command information.

items.title: Exciting New Announcement System UI in Frontend Web 🎉
items.summary: This update introduces a new announcement notification bell in the header bar, complete with a red unread badge. Users can now view announcements through the AnnouncementPopover component, which allows for marking announcements as read and managing them via an admin CRUD page. Additionally, the update includes new API endpoints for announcements and support for English and Chinese translations.

items.title: Exciting New Announcement System in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a comprehensive announcement system with new Django models for `Announcement` and `AnnouncementReadRecord`, featuring UUID primary keys and support for internationalization. Public API endpoints have been added for listing announcements, tracking unread counts, and marking announcements as read, alongside admin CRUD functionalities. The migration for the announcement system has also been included, enhancing the overall functionality of the platform.

items.title: Enhanced ACE Token Visibility in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: The $ACE Token carousel slide has been moved from position 6 to position 3 for improved visibility, right after the Claude Code slide. Additionally, the carousel autoplay interval has been standardized to 5 seconds across all slides, enhancing the user experience.

items.title: Revamp Skill Documentation to Align with Latest Specs in Skills 🚀
items.summary: This update corrects multiple `SKILL.md` files to ensure they match the latest OpenAPI specifications from AceDataCloud/Docs. Key changes include fixing parameter names, updating endpoints, and adding missing parameters across various skills like `fish-audio`, `google-search`, and `face-transform`. Additionally, new content has been added for skills such as `ai-chat` and `producer-music`, enhancing overall documentation accuracy and usability.

items.title: Enhance Luma CLI with Missing Models Command in Clis 🚀
items.summary: This update adds the previously missing `models` command to the Luma CLI, aligning it with the documentation and other CLI tools in the monorepo. Key changes include the addition of constants and a rich table renderer for model information, as well as the registration of the command in the CLI group. Users can now easily list available Luma models and their details.

items.title: Documentation is already in sync with upstream changes in A P Is 🚀
items.summary: The luma documentation has been verified and confirmed to be in sync with the latest upstream changes. Recent commits only affected the `openapi/luma.json` file, resulting in no markdown updates needed for the documentation. All relevant guides are up to date and ready for use.

items.title: Luma MCP Verified: No Changes Needed in M C Ps 🚀
items.summary: The Luma MCP has been confirmed to be fully in sync with the documentation following a recent translation update. Key findings indicate that there were no discrepancies in the API parameters, and all current specifications are accurately reflected in the code. As a result, no code changes are necessary.

items.title: Enhance URL Handling with Proxy Headers in x402 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces support for proxy headers in Django, allowing the application to trust forwarded host and protocol headers. As a result, well-known metadata will now emit public HTTPS URLs instead of internal HTTP URLs, improving security and accessibility.

items.title: Enhance Middleware with Fallback for Well-Known Paths in x402 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a middleware fallback for the /.well-known/x402 and /.well-known/x402/ paths, ensuring that requests to these endpoints are handled correctly. The existing facilitator metadata builder is reused for both middleware and view responses, and trailing-slash coverage has been added to the well-known tests. Overall, this enhances the robustness of the x402 service.

items.title: Enhance well-known route matching in x402 🚀
items.summary: This update switches the facilitator's well-known route to an explicit regex matcher, allowing both /.well-known/x402 and /.well-known/x402/ to resolve to the same view. The changes ensure better route handling and maintain compatibility. Verification checks have passed for the modified files.
